subcodes.first_line: O Compassionate Lord! These oppressed and forlorn ones are Thy party, and this assembly of bewildered ones are lovers of Thy face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار مهربان این حزب مظلومان پریشان تواند و این جمع آشفتگان تو عاشق روی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
